'''zawatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ceaser|ceaser]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ceaser|ceaser]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zawatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæwæthæth|zæwæthæth]] || [[word:zæwæthæj|zæwæthæj]] || [[word:zæwæthæsh|zæwæthæsh]] || [[word:zæwæthæ|zæwæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zawawathath|zawawathath]] || [[word:zawawathaj|zawawathaj]] || [[word:zawawathash|zawawathash]] || [[word:zawawatha|zawawatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zawathath|zawathath]] || [[word:zawathaj|zawathaj]] || [[word:zawathash|zawathash]] || [[word:zawatha|zawatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zawafthath|zawafthath]] || [[word:zawafthaj|zawafthaj]] || [[word:zawafthash|zawafthash]] || [[word:zawafthaf|zawafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zawathatha|zawathatha]] || [[word:zawathaja|zawathaja]] || [[word:zawathasha|zawathasha]] || [[word:zawathaka|zawathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zawathath|zawathath]] || [[word:zawathaj|zawathaj]] || [[word:zawathash|zawathash]] || [[word:zawatha|zawatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zawathathal|zawathathal]] || [[word:zawathajal|zawathajal]] || [[word:zawathashal|zawathashal]] || [[word:zawathakal|zawathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zawathathatha|zawathathatha]] || [[word:zawathajaja|zawathajaja]] || [[word:zawathashasha|zawathashasha]] || [[word:zawathaka|zawathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zawathathan|zawathathan]] || [[word:zawathajan|zawathajan]] || [[word:zawathashan|zawathashan]] || [[word:zawathakan|zawathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zawathathaoro|zawathathaoro]] || [[word:zawathajaoro|zawathajaoro]] || [[word:zawathashaoro|zawathashaoro]] || [[word:zawathakaoro|zawathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
